name: AlloChat
description: E2E encrypted messenger built on Algorand Mainnet

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https:; connect-src https://mainnet-api.algonode.cloud https://mainnet-idx.algonode.cloud https://api.pinata.cloud https://*.mypinata.cloud; object-src 'none';
